text:
First, note that in 1418, time zones did not exist in the modern sense.  
But if we assume Asia/Tokyo = UTC+9 and Asia/Singapore = UTC+8 (historical offsets may differ, but standard modern offsets are +9 and +8 respectively), then:

11:00 in Tokyo (UTC+9) → UTC = 02:00 (same day).  
UTC 02:00 → Singapore (UTC+8) = 10:00 (same day).

Thus, April 11, 1418, 10:00 in Asia/Singapore.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1418-04-11 10:00
